title: PMO – ERP Transformation (m/w/d)
required_skills: PMO experience in complex transformation programs
Degree in Wirtschaftsinformatik / BWL or comparable
matched_skills: PMO experience in complex transformation programs (HSBC USD 8M digital transformation PMO)
Organizational skills and problem-solving (demonstrated across multiple roles)
High degree of initiative (self-directed delivery at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd)
Top management document preparation and stakeholder reporting
Program progress consolidation and monitoring (6 workstreams at HSBC)
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination (Product, Engineering, Marketing, C-suite)
missing_skills: Retail or food retail industry experience
core_responsibilities: Member of the Programme Management Office (PMO) for an ERP transformation programme
Preparation and coordination of programme governance boards in collaboration with programme leadership
Preparation and alignment of top management materials / executive presentations
Maintenance and development of programme methodology
Consolidation and monitoring of project progress in close collaboration with cross-functional stakeholders
Taking ownership of special topics to minimise programme risks
recommended_emphasis: Highlight HSBC PMO role as direct match: USD 8M digital transformation programme, 6 workstreams, C-suite reporting
Emphasise executive stakeholder communication and top management document preparation experience
Showcase programme governance board coordination and risk escalation capabilities
Stress cross-functional coordination across diverse departments (Product, Engineering, Marketing, Finance)
Quantify programme monitoring output: budget dashboards, burn-rate reports, weekly status reporting
Mention German language proficiency prominently as it is explicitly required
Frame Hapag-Lloyd agile delivery experience as programme methodology execution
Note any ERP-adjacent experience or large-scale IT/digital transformation context to bridge the ERP gap
